name: AREthSetRequestId
title: AREthSetRequestId
syntax: LONG AREthSetRequestId ( dword messageHandle, dword requestId);
description: This function sets the request ID in the SOME/IP message header.

parameters.name: messageHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the SOME/IP message (e.g. see OnAREthMessage)

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
